who: fleet compliance officers managing 10-20 delivery logs/month
offer: For fleet compliance officers processing 10-20 delivery logs/month, manual entry causes compliance errors. We convert handwritten logs into digital compliance reports instead of manual data entry into spreadsheets.
problem: Manual entry of handwritten logs leads to compliance errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for fleet compliance officers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to fleet compliance officers with demo video
Community forums where compliance officers share tools
try_it: Let users try digital report generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
